Quán ốc ngon lắm nhe. Ốc hương sốt bơ chấm với bánh mì rất ngon. Sò huyết xào me ngon. Các combo giá phải chăng. Quán rộng rãi thoáng mát có chỗ đỗ xe ô tô. Nhân viên nhanh nhẹn thân thiện.

Nghỉ Lễ nên hẹn hò bạn ra đây chơi! Quán ngay công viên được hít thở không khí trong lành thật thích, ngồi chill chill trò chuyện không muốn về luôn nè. Món có kiểu Bắc , kiểu Nam phục vụ đa dạng khẩu vị vùng miền… ăn cũng okey, ngồi thưởng thức với cảnh quan này tính ra giá vậy rẻ nha. Bill 6 người mà hơn triệu thui
Xe tank đậu vô tư, Restroom thơm sạch, có cả máy gắp thú cho bọn trẻ chơi nữa! Sẽ quay lại quán khi có dịp!
Đồ ăn ngon nhé mn ơi, 2 anh chị chủ quán cute lắm, chỗ ngồi sát công viên rất thoáng, có cả phòng máy lạnh và ngoài trời nhé. Món ốc hương sốt trứng muối best seller ngon mà quên chụp hình 🤣

Quán xinh sạch sẽ và nhiều món ngon. Menu cũng khá rẻ so với khu vực. Combo mình gọi 7 món giá chỉ 4xx ăn ngon lắm nha. 2 chị em ăn no lặc lè. Quán kế công viên nên rất thoáng, đậu xe hơi đc thoải mái nữa.

Quán vị trí view đẹp, thoáng, các bàn có khoảng cách hợp lý nên không bị ồn ào bởi xung quanh, các bạn nhân viên phục vụ nhiệt tình dễ thương. Tuy nhiên đồ ăn có mấy món có sốt kiểu trứng muốn, hoặc sốt gì đó ăn bị ngán và mất vị của món gốc, nhìn chung vị của các món ăn chưa được ổn lắm, các món trong Combo thì số lượng rất ít. Mình đi tối thứ 7 nhưng quán khá vắng khách, có ban nhạc các bạn trẻ có lẽ đang tập chơi giọng hát nữ hơi yếu, chưa được hay. Nếu quán cải thiện được vị món ăn ngon và healthy thì mình nghĩ thực khách sẽ đông hơn.
Ốc tươi ngon, là quán ruột chi nhánh ở Bình Thạnh, bên này thì không gian rộng rãi, thoáng hơn, vì gần công viên Gia Định, mát mẻ và chill lắm lun
Lần thứ 2 quay lại. Rất bất ngờ đồ ăn ngon hơn rất nhiều luôn. Không gian siêu thoáng mát. Có công viên nên mát lắm luôn
Đồ ăn rất ngon, quán có không gian thoáng đãng, phù hợp đi nhóm, gia đình
Món nào cũng ngon 😋 Làm nhanh, phục vụ dễ thương và tận tình.

Tối qua lại ghé quán, giờ quán thêm nhiều món ăn rất ngon, đa dạng, phong phú.
Tuyệt vời, sẽ tiếp tục ủng hộ

Hôm nay mình ghé quán Ốc Dì Toàn mà đồ ăn ngon hết sẩy bà con à
Đi chợ cái mà 3p là có món ngon nóng hổi liền
Đồ ăn thì đa dạng phong phú lắm bà con à

Đồ ăn khẩu phần nhỏ nhưng phù hợp giá tiền.
Không gian quán thoáng đãng, đẹp và rất sạch sẽ.
Đồ ăn thì có món cũng được và ko hề rẻ nha, đĩa rau kho quẹt 109k,bia ken lon nhỏ mà 26k/lon là rất mắc nha
Quán có nhiều món ngon, không gian thoáng mát, đac ủng hộ nhiều lần. Có máy gấp thú cho trẻ em. Gần công viên tươi xanh
Thật sự lần đầu tiên đến đây đồ ăn thật sự rất ngon , nhân viên rất nhiệt tình nha 🥰

Gần mười năm về VN thăm gia đình thật bất ngờ khi thấy SG phát triển, đẹp và hiện đại quá, từ sân bay TSN về tôi có ghé quán ăn có view công viên mát đẹp quá, ngồi rất thoáng, thật dễ chịu không bị ngột ngạt như trong phố.
Vì rất nhớ món ăn Việt Nam nên tôi đã gọi nhiều món theo kiểu Bắc, kiểu Nam … rất may là quán đều có món đa dạng, món Nem rán thật sự làm tôi nhớ vị ngoài Bắc mà bà tôi hay cuốn, thêm món giả cầy mắm tôm cũng nhớ nhà lắm luôn.
Gia đình tôi đã có buổi tối thật vui, nhẹ nhàng thoải mái ở đây!
Đặc biệt là các bạn phục vụ cực kỳ dễ thương và phục vụ rất tận tình.
Đồ ăn ngon ,không gian đẹp, nhân viên nhiệt tình ,mọi người nên thử nhé

Quán có vị trí đẹp, ngay công viên, rất phù hợp đi cùng gia đình.
Đồ ăn ngon, mình rất thích các món ốc tươi, các bạn nhỏ thì mê món cơm chiên của quán
Highly recommend cho các gia đình dùng bữa cuối tuần vì có thêm chương trình Hát với nhau
Đồ ăn rất ngon nha. Đặc biệt là sốt trứng muối ngon. May mắn nay đi được nghe nhạc acoutis đã đã. View thoáng mát. Nhân viên dth nge

We stopped at Hoang’s Kitchen for lunch during a guided city tour, on our guide’s recommendation, and we’re glad we did. The ground floor was busy, mostly with locals and Asian guests, which felt like a very good sign.
We were seated on the first floor in a quieter area, which was perfect for a relaxed lunch break after a busy sightseeing morning. The service was attentive and genuinely friendly.
The food was excellent: beef pho, fried shrimp, beef in pepper sauce, cashew chicken, and a mango seafood salad. Everything we tried was delicious.
One small note for families with picky kids: there are no chicken nuggets or similar “emergency food” on the menu (which is understandable for an authentic Vietnamese restaurant), but the French fries were good and solved the problem for us.
Overall, a very positive experience, highly recommended!

This location is very clean and the service is good. The food was enjoyable, and the coconut coffee was delicious. Ruby was very kind and provided great service. We ordered the Bánh Xèo, and she showed us how to roll it properly. She also let us know that we could get extra vegetables and fish sauce, which was a nice touch.

We stopped by after exploring Ben Thanh Market and were so glad we did! The location is super convenient and an easy walk from the surrounds. The pho broth was rich and flavourful, and the summer rolls were incredibly fresh. The egg coffee was rich, creamy with a strong hit of coffee. I visited with my husband and son, and we all enjoyed our meals. The restaurant is clean and comfortable, and the service was amazing — staff were friendly, attentive, and spoke great English. Highly recommend!

Best service and food. Our host for the day, David was the BEST. He explained every dish in detail, showed us how to make the rice paper rolls and other dishes. Overall we were really happy with the service provided by David and the food. So happy to have had authentic pho, egg coffee desert, and pork rice paper rolls 😋!
Coming back here next time we're in Vietnam ❤️

Great food! The dishes are freshly prepared. They're perfectly seasoned and incredibly tasty. The staff takes great care to ensure everyone feels comfortable and at ease. Our waiter, Lucas, was dedicated to his work, and his friendly smile complemented the atmosphere. We'll definitely be back. Thank you so much!

Arrived during lunch and the first floor was packed. We were led to the second floor which was empty. It was cool inside aided by multiple ceiling fans. Our server, Ruby, was cute, fun, and professional. When I researched this restaurant, I knew I had to try the rolls- mixed pancake and beef petal, which were delicious. Ruby was so kind as to give us a tutorial on how to assemble them. In addition to the rolls, my husband ordered his first beer, the Saigon Special, which complimented the meal perfectly. I ordered the coconut coffee, which was my second time having it but what stood out was the crunchy coconut shavings on top. I’m so glad we stopped by!

Follow the tripadvisor recommendation and proven that this restaurant is worth stars. The pancake is really delicious, must-order item. Overall the food and service are good. Served by Henry who is really a friendly guy and showing us how to wrap the pancake.

Went to this restaurant based on the positive reviews. The food and service did not disappoint! Our server, Lukas, was wonderful and explained the menu well. He recommended the Vietnamese pancake which was my favorite dish. Great passionfruit mojito. Would return again! Thank you  Lukas!

Food was great, lots of classic Vietnamese dishes that you’d recognise. First impression wasn’t too great, as we were asked to move to a smaller table even though upon arriving we checked which table we were taking.

Regardless, one of the servers, Sumi, provided a great service, teaching us how to wrap the rice paper roll and made sure our experience was good.

An amazing dining experience! We visited Hoàng’s Kitchen for dinner and were so impressed that we came back again for lunch the following day. The food was consistently excellent, and every dish we tried was spot on. Since the cuisine was new to us, Nami went above and beyond to explain the dishes and guide us on how to eat them properly. Truly warm hospitality and fantastic food—absolutely deserves 5 stars.

We had a great experience at Hoang’s Kitchen. The atmosphere was really nice and welcoming, even though it was quite busy, especially with tourists. Ryan was our server and he was extremely friendly, attentive, and made us feel well taken care of. The food was fresh and absolutely delicious, with great flavors all around. Highly recommend trying the banh xeo!

The food and service is good :) Though most of the customers are mainly tourists, its a nice spot to relax and wind down after a warm day outside. The pancakes are really tasty. Food is flavourful. Our waiters are really good and attentive, especially Ryan who served with much joy. The place is comfortable for elderly customers too.

Nami the server is excellent excellent excellent! Her courtesy, attentiveness, and smart recommendations made my meal all the more enjoyable! I was travelling solo so it's somewhat difficult to order because the portions are not small. I ordered the Vietnamese Pancake with chicken, and an egg coffee. Nami suggested adding cut chillies to the dipping sauce - thank you, Nami! It made the difference!  Food is good, service is fabulous, and the decor of the restaurant cosy and comfortable. Come have a meal! What are you waiting for?

5 Stars all the way on this place, the concierge at our Hotel highly reccomended Hoang's Kitchen, the place was packed when we arrived but after about a 10 minute wait we were ushered upstairs to a well decorated space with seating for about 30 people, our waiter David introduced himself in perfect English and guided us through the comprehensive Menu, after starting off with lovely cocktails a refreshing Lime Mojito and my goto Pina Colada we had a Beef stirfry dish along with the Vietanamese omelette, spring rolls and a serving small pastry puffs. Very nice indeed our waiter David showed us how to prepare the omelette in a wrap with lots of herbs and salad. All in all a good dining experience at a reasonable cost.

We had such a good time here! The food was delicious and everything was exactly what we were hoping for. A huge shoutout to our waiter, Long—he was super friendly and took such good care of us. We’re definitely coming back and will be telling everyone at work to check this place out! ✨

We decided to give this place a try after seeing its insanely high Google rating. No need for reservations, and they serve food all day, which is always a plus! The moment you walk in, you can tell it’s a popular spot with tourists and foreigners.
We went for the Vietnamese pancake and a shrimp fried rice. The pancake was huge and super fun to eat, especially when the waitress showed us how to do the first roll. Personally, I wish they served it with some pickled carrots and cabbage instead of just raw veggies, but the flavor totally made up for it.
The shrimp fried rice, on the other hand, was a bit of a letdown. It was dry and kind of forgettable. Service was friendly.  The only downside was the atmosphere; it felt dark and gloomy, definitely could use better lighting and an uplift.

Woooow great service from Lucas, and so does the food! The waiter is sooo enthusiastic, one of the big differences from servers in the north. Was a bit suspicious when I saw it’s a sponsored restaurant but the Banh Xeo pancake is really good, with the seafood in it. The squid really makes it special and chewy, in a nice way!

Amazing!!! The food was fantastic. The service we received from Nami was brilliant. She showed us how to assemble and eat our dishes, she was patient, kind and attentive. Her English was also amazing. We hope to visit again

This is definitely THE BEST RESTAURANT to enjoy vietnamese cuisines in town, tasty Foods, Super attentive seller (his name is Ryan). He was quick, so friendly and welcoming. I would definitely come back here again.
The seafood fried rice was amazing, beef pho, sour fish soup, spring roll were  all really tasty.

We visited the restaurant with a group of four friends and had a wonderful dining experience. We tried several dishes, including Hà Nội fried spring rolls, stir-fried chicken with honey, beef rolled in wild betel leaf, and beef guava salad.

The food was absolutely delicious, with generous portions and rich, authentic Vietnamese flavors. Each dish was well-prepared and beautifully presented.

What truly made our experience special was the excellent service. The staff were very friendly and attentive, especially Lâm, who enthusiastically explained each dish in detail as it was served. His passion and knowledge really enhanced our meal.

We had authentic and delicious Vietnamese food here! Got the chance to make our own rolls.

Thanks to Ruby for serving us so well! Pleasant and cute lady.

The tables turnaround rate is pretty fast. We walked in for dinner on Friday and waited around 10minutes.

We were greeted and served by the wonderful Ruby. Bubbly and charming.
Started with a couple of mango smoothie's, then had 3 entries including the pancake. Ruby cut up the pancake and made the first one for us, delicious. Then we finished with the fried morning glory which I always assumed was a Thai dish and the pork belly with quail eggs. Great food  great experience, highly recommended

We highly recommend this place! Clean flavors, fresh dishes, and exceptional service. Thank you, Tomy, for making our meal even better!😋👌

Here’s what we order:

Green mango salad with shrimp, chicken pancake, fried catfish, egg coffee and coconut coffee. 💯

I really enjoyed my meal at Hoang’s Kitchen. The morning glory dish served with rice was simple yet incredibly delicious,fresh, well-seasoned, and very comforting. It’s one of those dishes that tastes light but satisfying at the same time!
Special thanks to David, our waiter, who was very friendly, attentive, and made sure everything was perfect throughout our meal. His warm service truly enhanced our dining experience. Highly recommended! 👍🏻

There are a couple of these Hoange restaurants around town, and this is the 2nd time I decided to eat at one due to the excellent Google reviews. Just as on my first visit to the location near Independence Palace, my visit to the one here, near the market, left me disappointed. The beef pho was not as flavorful as I’ve had elsewhere, did not come with basil, and the serving size was rather small for the price. The best I can say is the restaurant is comfortable and clean and the air conditioner works well, but if you are searching for a really good bowl of pho I would look elsewhere.

Food was pretty affordable (compared to other viet restos) and delicious! The highlight of our dining experience was our server, Nami. She was really helpful and polite, even recommending that we don’t order too much so we don’t waste the food and our money. True enough, we were already full after getting a Ban Xeo and Pho Ga. Thanks Nami! You’re a star!

Our waiter, David has Been an absolute legend, made my experience absolutely fantastic. I have really enjoyed the food and the service. The place is most certainly value for money.
Also as a side note, make sure you try the fried eggplants..

Hoang’s Kitchen has a great location in District 1 and a clean, comfortable setting. The menu is broad and includes vegetarian and vegan choices.

Unfortunately, despite nice presentation, the food is bland and lacks character. Flavors are very muted and clearly adjusted for international tastes, missing the essence of Vietnamese cuisine.

Disappointing if you’re looking for authenticity.

Hoang’s doesn’t try to impress—and that’s exactly why it works.

We ordered cashew chicken and a pancake bánh mì, and both made their point without theatrics.

The cashew chicken is solid, not flashy. Proper wok heat, vegetables still crisp, sauce restrained instead of sugar-heavy. Cashews are toasted enough to add texture, not just filler. This tastes like a local kitchen that knows when to stop adding sauce.

The pancake bánh mì is the standout. Crisp-edged pancake, fluffy inside, tucked into a bánh mì that actually balances bread, filling, and fat. No sogginess, no gimmicky overload. It feels street-smart rather than café-clever. You eat it fast because it stays good only if eaten hot—and that’s a compliment.

Service by Choco is extremely good. She went extra mile in suggesting nice dishes and also made Banh Mi for us diligently.

If you care about flavour integrity and value, Hoang’s delivers.

Bottom line:
Honest food, correctly priced, no tourist pandering. Not a destination restaurant—but a place you’re glad you stopped at, and one you’d return to without debating alternatives.

The food was absolutely delicious! Our server, Ryan, was very friendly and attentive. He even showed us the proper way to enjoy the Vietnamese pancake, which made the experience even more authentic and fun. Highly recommended!

Great restaurant near the market. Kevin was my server and he was great. Very kind and attentive. The fresh spring rolls were ok compared to the banana leaf minced meat rolls... they were incredible. Kevin showed me how to eat it! Had a very enjoyable experience and highly recommend.

The food was exactly what we wanted in Vietnam — Vietnamese food!  The pancake was sooooo good, and Lukas showed us how to prepare and eat it properly.  We will definitely come back to this restaurant!

Vegan dishes of poor quality, quite expensive for Vietnam. The so-called (and expensive) "caramelized" bananas were definitively not caramelized and hardly warm...
If you want to eat good vegan food, do not waste your time in those restaurants wanting to cater to everyone, advertising vegan and classical dishes. For fresh and tasty vegan food made with quality ingredients, go to a specialized restaurant like Nâunâu, 120 m further (reasonable prices too).
Finally, one could do without a pushy waitress bothering each of her customers to give her a good rating... It seems that all the waiters there practice this, considering the large number of totally undeserved over-rated comments of naïve foreigners (basically the only customers there, the local people knowing better).

Came with a group: Tami and Ryan were absolute gems, getting our food quickly and with a big smile. Ryan did well teaching us to roll our own spring rolls. Highly recommend for a wonderful sit down meal

I had an amazing experience here. The food was absolutely delicious – every dish was packed with flavor and beautifully presented. Our server, Gin, was fantastic. She was attentive, friendly, and really made us feel welcome throughout the meal. She made great recommendations and was always there when we needed something.
If you're looking for a place with yummy food and top-notch service, this spot is definitely worth a visit. Will definitely be coming back soon!

I had a great time at Hoang Restaurant. The egg coffee and Vietnamese dumplings were delicious, and I was seated right away even on a busy night. The staff were attentive and friendly, which really added to the experience. The pork with quail eggs was flavorful, though a little too oily for my taste.

One thing worth mentioning is how reviews are handled. The waiter walked me through the process and even took my phone to help — which explains why they have so many reviews! While I completely understand the importance of feedback, I believe quality over quantity matters. Reviews feel more genuine when customers have the freedom and time to write them naturally.

I’m giving 4 stars because of how the review process was handled and because the pork dish was a bit too oily for me.

We had a wonderful dinner at Hoang’s Kitchen! They serve authentic Vietnamese cuisine with plenty of vegetarian and vegan options. The food was delicious, and the atmosphere was warm and welcoming. Dave took great care of us throughout the evening — excellent service! Conveniently located just across from our hotel. Highly recommended!

My first dinner in vietnam and it’s been amazing. The food is freshly made to serve. We appreciate all of the staff for their eagerness to help especially Nami, she has been amazing since start to finish. Amazing service, they help all of us splitting the bills without hesitation.

The food was amazing and our server Ruby was great! I ordered the beef rolled in wild betel leaf and Ruby showed us the proper way of making the roll. My partner ordered the stir fried beef with chili and lemon grass and he also enjoyed his dish. We highly recommend trying this place if you’re ever in Saigon.

Food is really good! Pho broth was clear yet flavourful, easy to finish. Fried rice was nice too! The staff are also fluent in English making it easy for tourists. Tomy in particular was very friendly :)

Hoang Kitchen's food and atmosphere is really great! The G/chu meal is the highlight. My husband had the beef in bamboo which is amazing too! Overall super happy and satisfied. You need to try this if you are in Ho chi Minh
J was very helpful, nice, and welcoming. Definitely would come back! We ordered the bahn xeo, morning glory with garlic, and seafood noodles. Everything was very good.

Good restaurant with good timing.  Food was tasty. I was surprised to see a queue outside but we were in 15 min later as a big party of 7 .  I wouldn't say is wow but I liked it and prb would go back if visiting the area again.

The food and atmosphere is really good. My waiter was Tomy and he was very accommodating, friendly, and definitely knows how to give great customer service. He positively explains how certain combination of food works which helped me appreciate the different flavors more. They even have recommendations for first timers. I will definitely go back to this place

Food was AMAZING. I had the beef pho and tried the shrimp spring rolls. The ambiance of the restaurant was relaxed even if the location is busy. Our server Tommy was super friendly and really gave topnotch customer service. Highly recommended!

Totally worth a visit, food slaps, service is excellent.
The food is well presented, environment is clean, flavours are top notch, decent value. All servers speak english and food comes fast, server Lucas went above and beyond 🫶
Bun Xeo 11/10 - fantastic service and fantastic flavour
Hanoi Fresh rolls 10/10
Shrimp rice paper rolls 10/10
Beef Pho 8/10
Mango seafood salad 9/10
Chicken fried rice 8/10

Will be back!

I HIGHLY recommend dining at Houng's Kitchen. The vibes are very chill, the food was extremely flavorful and the staff was absolutely amazing. Tommy was my server and he had given me his 2 best recommendations which was the Stir Fried Beef and Morning Glory veggie dishes. Both were absolutely delicious. I am definitely looking forward to returning to try some of their chicken dishes. A+++

My last night in Vietnam after 3 weeks and this meal did nor disappoint. My waiter David made sure everything was perfect
Excellent service, lovely food, served with a smile .. and very good value for money. Thank you 😊

Our favorite restaurant in Ho Chi Minh City, District 1! The staff are absolutely amazing — very polite, professional, and always helpful. Service is quick, and the food is always fresh and incredibly tasty. We came here every day during our stay because everything was just perfect each time. We happened to be served by Nami on every visit (not by plan!), and she was always wonderful — attentive, friendly, and made our experience even better. Highly recommend this place to anyone visiting Ho Chi Minh!

Amazing food, amazing service, amazing place. Must visit! Haliry truly was an amazing server: so kind and with such warm hospitality.

We ordered the chicken pho and the vegetarian fried spring rolls. The pho was the best pho my fiancé ever ate! And since I’m gluten intolerant, I couldn’t believe the fried spring rolls were made only with rice paper. Hilary even double checked it with the kitchen for me. Amazing service. I absolutely recommend this place to everyone!

I came here because of high ranking review, and I glad that didn’t disappointed me the foods super delicious under my expectation! The crew here name Hilary she very charming pretty and friendly, definitely will come back again ! PS : better make reservations first before coming because very good business here. Anyway I walked in this time and been waited about 10 mins only.

we headed over to hoang's kitchen for a meal after our tour guide recommended it. Hillary provided quick service, and even taught us how to eat certain foods. the viands were delicious, but the service made it all the better. :) portions are larger than you would expect for the price.

Went here for some rain shelter and got to eat very delicious food. All three of us got some type of fried rice and we were very satisfied. The food portions were generous and most of the food comes with a side soup.
We were served by hospitable servers one of them was called Lang or Long I think. ☺️
To sum up, definitely come here if you have a chance.

Enjoyed our dining experience here, food was lovely and service was wonderful! Thankyou to Mike in particular who really took care of us...he was attentive, well mannered and very professional in his service in every way.

Fantastic service from Lukas - extremely attentive and polite. Lovely food and atmosphere. I had the Vietnamese pancake and Lukas demonstrated how to make them with the rice paper. Would definitely return if in Ho Chi Minh City for longer!

We saw high review and thought it was a good restaurant. After trying these dishes, we can rate only 3 stars. Tastes are bland, food not hot enough (precooked and heated probably), can be way better. The staff who took our order was attentive though. Probably high reviews were from tourists not local authentic Vietnamese tastes!
Vaan Tuna was very good server. The food was amazing. Spring rolls, stir fries, egg coffee all very good. Highly recommend. Thanks
The 5 star rating is well deserved, all 3 of us agreed. The food is exceptionally well done, with Henry being very friendly to us 💪💪💪

The staff was really nice and attentive. Special thank you to Nami, who showed me how to eat the ban xheo and checked on me throughout my meal to make sure I was enjoying. The food was also fantastic, fresh, delicious and what I needed on this very warm day. Would recommend to anyone who is looking for great food and a cool place(figuratively and literally😉).

Everything is great! The food is so awesome a have a great portion for each dishes that we order! David and his crew mates are awesome and have a great hospitality and fast service! We waited for like 37 mins but on Filipino culture, thats normal waiting time for food but they gave us complimentary dishes while we wait! They made our first dinner in Vietnam so memorable with their food and their service! 🇻🇳💛

Everything was great.  We were just walking by and saw this restaurant. It's a bit pricey but still reasonable for tourists.  We ordered spring rolls, a chicken stir fried dish. Hanoi Bun Cha with grilled pork and stir fried morning glory.  Ayla was our server and she was very friendly and solicitous.  Often checking on us to see if everything was all right and always service with a smile!  All the dishes we ordered can
Promptly and she showed us how to wrap the sun Cha.
Best seafood pancakes i've had in Ho Chi Minh city so far. Ruby was our server and she was very enthusiastic and friendly. We cant wait to be back! ❤️ Love from the Philippines.

Great Vietnamese food,
Definitely for tourist as there were no locals inside
But staff was nice and great. Specifically Lucas helped me out and showed me how to eat the Binh xeo.
First egg coffee here in Vietnam and it had amazing texture.

The restaurant is very well looked after and the food is delicious.
A special mention goes to Ruby, who took care of us during the service.
She is very friendly and professional.
She taught us how to eat the typical local crêpes.
Lov u

Came here for lunch.I had a great experience—Tomy provided excellent service, attentive and friendly throughout. The food was delicious and well-presented, making the whole visit enjoyable. Just hope that my noodles soup could be a little hotter. Great service and food overall.

Saw all of the great reviews and decided to try it. Stay tuned, there is a curious consideration to be made about that!

We were seated quickly which was a great start. Got a stir-fried morning glory with beef and a bánh xèo which were both delicious. The beef dish made us want to order more rice to soak up all of the delicious stir-fry sauce 🤤 Our server even taught us how to eat the bánh xèo (I was too shy to let her know was Vietnamese myself 🤭). It's very tourist friendly as there were many English speaking servers and I don't think I saw any locals while I was dining. Even so, the food was definitely authentic. The cleanliness of the restaurant also gave me the confidence to try the fresh veggies and hurray! No funny stomach business for me 😁

The cons were that the food was on the pricey end, especially considering the portion sizes weren't very big.

Now about these reviews; looks like quantity over quality to me 🤔 I noticed at the end of my dinner that many of them looked eerily similar and the sheer amount that came out in the hour I was there was suspicious. Not pointing fingers at the restaurant but something to consider when choosing a restaurant purely based on the amount of reviews 😅

Super super place. Recommended to us by our driver. Food was definitely 5 star as was the service. Our waiter Peter was new but very keen to learn and a pleasure to talk to. Well done to all the team 🙏

Sumi’s service is excellent and top notch. She taught me and my friend how to eat the chicken pancake. It’s super yummy! Not to forget egg coffee taste good. The cashew chicken and green mango salad are sumptuous and mouth-watering too! Taste are superb! Sumi has been patient and attentive to our needs which I really appreciate it. Will come back to Hoang’s kitchen again whenever I visit HCM.

One of the best restaurant in Ho Chi Minh City!! Love the food! Really really good flavor and i guarantee that it is worth the money you spent!

Kevin, our waiter is also a cool guy! Love how he serve us and how warm his attitude is!! Kevin makes out experience perfect here!
Excellent food and service. I ordered the fish special and our waitress Hillary demonstrated how to roll it with rice paper.  The eggcoffee was really tasty and she explained how to make it.

we previously visited their restaurant in hanoi and knew we had to come back again in ho chi minh city. the beef in the bamboo tube was amazing and our server david took amazing care of us he has fantastic customer service. would highly highly recommend everyone to visit!
Long served us really well. The food is amazing too! We will definitely go back here to try other dishes.

We had an amazing experience here. The food was absolutely delicious – every dish was packed with flavour and beautifully presented. Tuan was fantastic. He was attentive, friendly, and really made us feel welcome throughout the meal.

Chance upon this restaurant that is near my hotel. Service from Tomy was impeccable since we enter~ He was able to communicate in English and also explained how to eat the Ban Xeo. All foods were yummy!! Wished there were no wind blowing though .. as our food got cold fast. But overall a good experience here!

Nice food and lovely service by Kevin. We actually came a few nights ago and sat downstairs which had a nicer atmosphere than upstairs. Kevin was very attentive and friendly and explained how to eat the Vietnamese pancake correctly which was very helpful!
Wow 10/10. The Vietnamese pancakes with beef and the pork spring rolls were incredible. Great final feed before heading home 🇦🇺 …

Hilary gave us outstanding service! We tried the chicken friend rice, pork fried rolls, stir fried shrimp with cashews, and Saigon beers. She was so thoughtful, efficient and kind. The food was terrific. We will be back to Hoang’s Kitchen!

Tourist trap with extremely high rating on google.  Avoid if you after real authentic Vietnamese food.  Majority of their customers there were foreigners with zero ideas what Vietnamese food is like.   Taste and ingredients no where near the authentic stuff.  Big No No 🙅🏻

Came here for spring rolls and it did not disappoint! Both fresh & fried were delish

Menu — wide variety of Vietnam local dishes

Atmosphere is comfortable and suitable for dinner vibes.

Service - staff were very attentive and courteous

Henry was very helpful and nice. We loved the atmosphere and food. We are coming back tomorrow again!
If you dont have a reservation you can wait for like 15/20 minutes but its worth it :)

We ordered the seafood pancake, Hanoi fried fish wrap, beef fried rice and egg coffee. It was soo good. One of the best egg coffees I've tasted. Tiny our server treated us so well. She really took care of all our needs and was so helpful to show us to wrap the food.
The food was very good. Long the waiter was very polite and helpful. The atmosphere was amazing. Seems like a great place to stop on a day tour.

Servers name Long is very helpful and he speaks english. Overall is good and they serve Beef, Chicken, Pork and Vegan Food. It is good if you have friend that are choosy.
My cheese bake fried chicken rice with pineapple is so so only as the rice are dry for most asians. My friend get another beef fried vegetable is very very nice. For tourist I think you better choose chef recommend, it might be more to public flavour.

The sweet & sour chicken had just the right amount of sweetness, spicy flavor with crunchy perfectly cooked veggies.
The service was excellent.
My drink had a paper straw.
Going back again for more great food.

I made the right decision to try their vietnamese pancake. So grateful and blessed that I did.

Thank you Ruby for assisting me Today and help me to make pancake with rice rolls. So delicious!!!! You MUST try it!!! Keep it up all the staffs and Ruby!!!
Peter was a great waiter, very friendly and accommodating ✨ the food was also really really good, would definitely recommend.

Great experience!! Peter really did an awesome job making us feel welcomed and involved, even demonstrated how to eat their best-selling vietnamese pancakes!! I came out of it fully immersed into their culture.. will definitely come back!

I give this restaurant a try as they have high ratings and I am totally satisfied. The food was good. My server Ruby is friendly and welcoming even I am a solo customer.  Actually all other staffs are passionate (another male staff helped an old lady with the door steps when she leaves). They also speak perfect English. Recommended!

Không gian sạch sẽ, thoáng mát. Đồ ăn vừa miệng, mình ăn phở chay thấy khá là ngon và nhiều rau. Bánh kếp kèm kem cũng khá ổn, mình không thích ăn ngọt nhưng độ ngọt của bánh ở đây khá là vừa phải, không bị gắt. Bạn Tomy phục vụ rất là chu đáo và dễ thương. Sẽ quay lại lần sau ha

We have dined in here after visiting museums .
The restaurant is very good, all dishes are tasty and presentation is very nice too. The waiter , Mr. Ryan is very attentive and helpful. We have a great time having lunch here .

Red was so kind to us! He ensured we were well taken care of. My food was slightly cold and he offered to get me a new order and it came back hot. Thank you so much for the great hospitality and great food 🤍
We had the beef pho and mango salad and it was so good. Highly recommend it! Our waiter Bi is really nice too.
Nice place to eat and service is great. We were served by Hilary, friendly n helpful. Thank u.

This is the second time we’ve eaten at Hoang’s Kitchen and once again the food did not disappoint. The service is top notch as well and the food was served quickly and hot. Our waitress Hilary was so friendly and attentive. It made our visit even more enjoyable. #Hilary.

Hilary was an amazing host and the food was soooooo good. Highly recommend this place. Our hotel was across the road so it was out 3rd time eating here. The Vietnamese pancake was to die for. Cocktails are yummy also 10/10 🇻🇳🦷

My god the food here is delicious. Thought it would be a tourist trap at first since there were so many foreigners, but the food is totoally amazing and the portion sizes are HUGE. 10/10 would come again for sure.

Thanks Hilary for serving us!
We had a lovely meal. Great service by our waiter Tuna. Very delicious food and great service. Highly recommend.
Food and service where great! Tiny was very nice and made sure all our needs were met throughout the dinner. We had deep fried spring rolls, banh xeo and bun cha and it was all phenomenal .

Extremely overpriced with very small portion sizes.
I had the standard beef noodle soup (Beef Pho). Looking at the prices, it was very steep compared to other places nearby. When it arrived, I was shocked at how small it was considering the price.
I see there's thousands of 5 Star reviews here. When I Google'd best place to eat in Ho Chi Minh City this restaurant came up for to the high amounts of reviews and average being 4.9, so it won't be hard pressed to assume they get customers to leave a 5 Star review, just like MET Restaurants in Hanoi.
I admit, the interior decor is nice but it certainly does NOT justify the high prices.

Hillary served us and made it an amazing experience. She was attentive and friendly, explaining everything clearly to us along the way. The food was amazing and reasonably priced. Will definitely be back. Thank you Hillary
Lucas was a very attentive and friendly server he was helpful and very efficient. Thank you for such an amazing experience and delicious food. I would recommend!

Their banh xeo is special - would recommend. I also ordered the prawn summer rolls which was marked as ‘best seller’ but honestly wasn’t anything special. Ryan was my server and he was super attentive and had such good energy when he was showing me how to eat the banh xeo. I came to eat here a by myself and felt very taken care of by all the staff! Thank you Ryan and team ☺️

Really had a good dinner over here. The food as always fantastic! Service was very good. Specially the server david who is our server that night. He did very well on he’s job. I highly recommend this place as this place has the authentic Vietnamese food.
Fantastic meal. Flavours were amazing, fast service and great ambience. Hilary our server was so nice. We'll be back.

We had a wonderful experience thanks to Nam. He was incredibly kind and attentive, especially with my daughter—he patiently helped her choose something to eat and made her feel very comfortable. The food was also delicious. Thank you, Nam, for the great service!

Amazing food, great atmosphere. Tried the bun cha which was delicious and would 100% reccomend to anyone who visits. Ruby served us and she was hugely welcoming and super friendly. Showed us how to eat the dishes properly and talked us through the menu.
Great food and service! Been looking for a fresh spring roll and this restaurant did not disappoint. Thank you Alex for the excellent service too!
Everything from tonight’s dinner was amazing! Service was great even though it was busy tonight. We appreciate our server Red for being so attentive.
Tuna gave us great service and we really enjoyed eating here. The food was delicious. We will come back soon. So fresh.

The food was awesome! Authentic VN Cuisine, with large food servings. You’ll never be wrong with this place. And Sarah, as the girl attendant, is very nice and helpful. Will surely comeback!

Edit: my second time coming, and will surely comeback again and again and again. Food is super delicious with excellent customer service, Tommy your the best!
Very good service from Mike, very patient in demo how to eat the rice rolls. Food is excellent. Highly recommend!

Came today for some food and was greeted by David a young man who was our server. He was very friendly and professional and it was a pleasure to have him as our server. The food was spot on. No complaints at all

I ordered chicken with cashews. It was really good. Coconut juice was sweet and refreshing. Food comes out of the kitchen hot.

Our server, #Hilary was very attentive. Overall, it was a great experience.

The food here is professionally amazing, and the service is very engaging full of the warmth of hospitality, Ms. Tiny has a great smile and shows professionalism. The experience is worth the price, as well as the high rates on google.
The food was absolutely perfect. 2 adults and 2 kids and couldn’t fault the whole experience. Kevin was an helpful and friendly  waiter. Can’t wait to come back.
Excellent tasty food in an elegant and clean restaurant. Special mention to our waitress Nami who’s been very kind, helpful and professional!

Just had an amazing meal here! The food was absolutely delicious, seriously top-notch. And the service? Fantastic by PANH.  The staff were super friendly and really on top of things. Definitely recommend this place if you're looking for a great dining experience.
Great food & experience, recommend to try  Bun Cha Hanoi & Fried Spring Roll. Hillary was our friendly server!

Nami truly gave us the best service. She explained how to eat the food and told us about it in detail. This was our first meal and first restaurant experience in Vietnam, and she gave me the best experience. Thank you so much. Also, the Vietnamese pancake was absolutely delicious. Anyone can enjoy it, and I highly recommend it.

Everything we ordered was fresh and full of flavor — from the crispy fried bites to the warm, aromatic pho. The ingredients tasted authentic and the presentation was beautiful (the flowers were such a nice touch. The atmosphere was cozy and perfect for a chill lunch or dinner.

Special shout-out to Hillary, our server — she was attentive, friendly, and made the whole dining experience extra pleasant. Definitely one of the best Vietnamese spots I’ve tried!

They ask you to review but the review is worth doing!!! Very delicious and they were kind and with good attentive service 💞💞💞 Ayla deserves wonderful compliments and raise! She was kind, helpful and taught us how to make the rolls from the pancake! Will recommend for really fresh and authentic veggie dishes!

I can't fault a thing. The vibe, decor, food, service all outstanding. As outstanding as the birds eye chillies served with our food!!! Kevin was so polite and helpful. Super friendly too. Highly recommend.

We were here for dinner, and we agree that the food is absolutely delicious. The location of the restaurant was just absolutely perfect, easy to find 🙌 The staff are so friendly. The staff, Ruby was so helpful with our food. She is so patient to show us how to make our own roll. Highly recommend if youre looking for a great place to eat a vietnamese in the city center 🙌

It was only 6 minutes ride from our hotel and we were the first to arrive for brunch.  We were greeted by wait staff  Tin and recommended the chicken and beef pho as we wanted something soupy.  The beef pancake was out of this world.  We also had the fresh spring roll.  All in all clean and excellent service served  with fresh, quality ingredients.  A must try

We stumbled on this place by accident while searching in the rain - this was the MOST INCREDIBLE food, with amazing service from Ryan. I will definitely be returning. Make sure this is on your must visit list!!! Special shoutout to the beef pho. THANK YOU RYAN!
David gave us excellent service and the food was delicious. Would highly recommend!! I had the cashew chicken

We had an amazing experience at Hoang's Kitchen. We tasted authentic Vietnamese food and loved all the items. Stir fried chicken, Steamed shrimp Spring roll, fried chicken and caramelised banana dessert. Ryan was a great host, courteous and helped us witg the food selection.

Our server was Red! He was incredible. Very hospitable and kind, he went out of his way to make conversation with us. The vibes were pretty cool, the artwork on the walls was very cool, and the food was great!

Love the food and as my first time here in Vietnam the service here gave me a great impression. Hilary’s service was fabulous
Just hoped the soup pho was more and it was a little cold when it arrived.

Great food and nice service provided by our waitress Hilary.
She was kibs and explained how we should make our rolls.
Fantastic atmosphere
Very nice and chill place with good food and atmosphere. The waiter, Hillary is a very nice person too!

We had dinner here and it was so nice! Our waiter David was so friendly and kind and made us feel so comfortable and welcome.
The food was also really well presented and super tasty. Im vegan and they had so many options for me;  my friend isnt vegan and they had heaps of options for them too.
We didnt realise it would be so busy, so we were lucky they manage to squeeze us in on the spot!
I would definitely go here again.

Fantastic Traditional Vietnamese Food in a great location in Ho Chi Minh City.Food was delicious, hot and quick and the service from Mike was excellent and truly made us feel welcome, explaining everything well in English and demonstrating how to construct some of the food. Would highly recommend a visit if in the area

Vietnamese food never disappoints—flavorful, fresh, and consistently one of the best cuisines around. The service was just as impressive, with the crew making us feel welcome and cared for. Special shoutout to Sumi for her warmth and attentiveness!

Excellent food!
At first, I thought it might be a tourist trap because of the huge number of reviews — but I was completely wrong. The restaurant truly surprised me. Hilary showed us how to properly eat Vietnamese pancakes and was extremely attentive. She gave us great recommendations on which dishes to try. We were really impressed!

Nice environment and decor. The food gives you taste of different Vietnamese dishes from different regions. Kevin was a helpful waiter when I told him my allergy. The food was prepared quickly and treated great.

Thank you for such a wonderful meal, the food was amazing! The black pepper beef was delicious and there was lots of vegan options for vegan guests. Our host David was so warm and welcoming! He was quick and efficient with every request! The workforce as a whole were a pleasure! We only have one day in the city but we will sure to recommend to our friends who will be here soon! Thank you again David!

The food and services are amazing. The hospitality of the server mainly David & Long who helped us understand the menu, allow us to be comfortable, very attentive and accommodating with our request.

The food is really amazing and presentation is very appealing.

Kuddos to this restaurant and the amazing staffs.
Highly recommended.
Peter was very friendly! We had a perfect dinner here!

The food at Hoang’s Kitchen is honestly some of the best I’ve ever had in my life. Every bite was full of flavor, and you can really taste the care put into each dish. What made the experience even better was the service—the staff were so kind and patient. They explained how to properly eat the dishes, which I really appreciated, and their English was really good too. It made the whole meal feel even more enjoyable and welcoming. Highly recommend! Find Hilary if you got there!!!! She is so helpful and answer all your questions!
The food is really good! Highly recommended Vietnamese Restaurant in Ho Chi Minh! Friendly staff (Uyen Tran) and very accommodating. Kudos to this restaurant

This is a must try if you're vegetarian, but they also have plenty of meat options. The flavors, freshness, and preparation are excellent. The staff were very friendly and helpful, especially for English speakers. I plan to come back before I leave, it was that good.
Perfect food and perfect service. Team   LG were perfect. Highly recomend. Delicious

The food recommendations were spot on, and the variety of cuisines was executed very well. One particular staff member, Ryan, provided excellent service, although the attentiveness of the rest of the team was inconsistent.

There was an issue with a dirty beer mug, but it was handled professionally with a full replacement, including the beer, which I appreciated. The staff also took the time to explain how to enjoy a local specialty, which added to the experience.

The restaurant is conveniently located in a popular district. The atmosphere felt deliberate and aligned with a modern design aesthetic, which suited my preferences. Food quality was outstanding, and the value far exceeded the price paid.

There was no wait time as we were able to walk in immediately. That said, aside from one staff member who delivered truly exceptional service, most of the team could have been more attentive.

We came to Hoang's kitchen this evening.
The food was beautiful and Tiny our waitress was amazing! She was very attentive and lovely to talk to. She is a credit to the business 💛

We had a chicken curry, stir fried beef with morning glory, summer rolls, and vietnamese pork pasty.
Had a nice lunch at this clean spot for lunch. Food is just ok but very clean. The service guy Long is very attentive, quick & smart in knowing what to recommend. Thank you Long

The food was excellent and arrived very quickly, though it wasn’t piping hot. The atmosphere felt a bit chaotic, and if you need anything you may have to track down a waiter. It didn’t bother us too much, but be prepared for minimal attention unless you’re clearly an American.

Came today as a random find and was not disappointed, food and service was great and the server i believe his name was David was helpful and very attentive. Made our experience great, will definitely come back.
Tomy did a great job with food presentation and even gave us a little history on the food. Very fresh, well presented. I would recommend 🌸⭐🌸

Absolutely loved this place! I came here with my sister who’s vegan, and we were so impressed by how many great options they had for everyone — vegan or not. The whole menu was super inclusive and delicious. We came during the busy lunch rush around 1pm, but the service was still top-tier. Ryan took amazing care of us — warm, attentive, and genuinely hospitable. He made us feel so welcome and respected. Can’t recommend this spot enough!
Food was great I really enjoyed everything along with a pinacolda drink our server Tiny was very attentive and always checked on our group to see if we needed anything

Highly recommend! The food is absolutely delicious, juicy, rich with flavors, and freshly made. The service is outstanding; Avo was incredibly helpful and kind, making the experience even better. Will definitely come back!

Contrary to the other reviews here, I thought the price was steep for the quality of food. I ordered morning glory with beef and rice and for 195k, the beef was barely visible, maybe less than 20% of my plate. One could go to other smaller restaurants for half of the price for authentic Vietnamese food. However, I do have to say the staff were really friendly and nice.

It's a bit telling when essentially 100% of customers are tourists. If you have never tried Vietnamese food it's an ok introduction. But for me, the flavours severely miss, the beef is tough and the prices are high. Slow service.
The food is very fresh and tasty! We loved their seafood pancake!! The service is impeccable. I'd like to particularly thank Ms. My for the great service :)
Excellent service from Sumi, demonstrating how to eat our bun cha! Great food
Mike took care of us so well,great place amazing food . Must visit when you're in viet nam

Ask for Ryan when you make your reservation and you'll have an amazing experience. We loved all his recommendations and his personal touch.
Evry item on the menu

The food is wonderful. Bunny gave us so friendly the instruction how we can eat a traditional Bun Cha.
We have to say Bunny thank you. Another day we come in and we aye a little bit. Ryan was our server. He made his work perfekt.
The dining atmosphere is nice, the dishes are very delicious, and the waiter Lucas has a very good attitude! I will come here again.

So glad we happened across this little gem. Food was fantastic Lukas was a wonderful host. Teaching us how to put the Bun Cha together was an experience ! I had the Bun Cha. Novel and sooo tasty. Also tried the stir fried chicken, again excellent. Do not hesitate to eat here. You won’t be disappointed.
The food here is amazing, and I absolutely loved the ambience. Kevin provided excellent service and made our experience even better. Highly recommend visiting this place

I had an amazing experience at Hoang’s Kitchen! The food was absolutely delicious and full of flavor, and it arrived very quickly after ordering. The service was outstanding – our waiter, David, was extremely friendly, attentive, and made us feel truly welcome. I highly recommend this restaurant to anyone looking for great Vietnamese food and excellent hospitality!
We had a lovely dinner at Hoang's. Food arived super quick and was very tasty. Our server, Nami, was very helpful and kind. We really liked eating here,  absolutely recommend.

Amazing culinary and cultural experience,I'd absolutaly reccommend for people who are looking for good authentic Vietnamese food 😊
I had the Chicken Pho, the vegetable rolls and  egg coffee and all of them were amazing
The staff is super friendly too!
Definitely would love to come again

Our first taste of Vietnam was an absolute delight, thanks to a quick Google search that led us to Hoang's Kitchen! And boy, it did not disappoint. 😋
Every meal was not just tasty, but an art form. The attention to detail in assembling each “bun cha”was an experience in itself, highlighting every ingredient. Thanks to their helpful staff for showing us how to properly assemble and enjoy it. 🙏🥰
It's no wonder Hoang's Kitchen boasts a 5-star rating on Google. Their food, service, and even price are truly exemplary. It gave us a fantastic introduction to Vietnamese cuisine -  delicious, balanced with protein and lots and lots of veggies! Leaving us satisfied, very full but without the guilt feeling 😁🥰
Sumi was in charge of my table, and she helped a lot. She is good at English. The food was awesome. I highly recommend to try pancakes.
The service from Mike was one of the best we received on our trip and the food comes in perfect portions for sharing and trying many dishes.
Rất hài lòng! Đồ ăn rất vừa vị, nhân viên cực nhiệt tình. Mình được bạn Lâm phục vụ rất chu đáo và tận tình. Đúng chất ngon- bổ- rẻ ngay trung tâm Sài Gòn.
Our attendant Nam is very hospitable . He helps us with everything i thought he is the owner of huangs kitchen. Thw food is great and i am definitely coming back again

It’s good
Food taste good
Menu choices are good
Service very good
Everything good 👍🏼

Super recommended this restaurant if you are a tourist
Best place in HCM City for authentic Vietnamese food. Food was delicious. The waiter Mr. Mike provided a great service and explained all dishes very well. We will come back for sure !❤️❤️❤️

Had an excellent lunch with Panne as our waitress! Stumbled upon this place after seeing that it had a 4.9 star rating with over 10k reviews and it honestly exceeded our expectations. We had fried fish and pork along with a traditional Vietnamese pancake. Panne helped us with the making of the wraps and she made our day with her bubbly personality and excellent recommendations.

I would definitely not hesitate to recommend this restaurant to anyone in the area. Reasonably priced, extremely delicious Vietnamese food with some of the best service I've ever experienced at a restaurant- what's not to love!

Had a lovely dinner here yesterday. The place was super busy which is always a good sign. We were served by Min. She was exceptional. Really good English, always smiling and always made sure we’re were ok, were enjoying our food and had all we need. Would recommend this place of your in Saigon.

We found this place by chance and Oh My God was this place superb. Our servers name was “Grinch” and he did an excellent job. He was ready to take our order with a smile and we had a blast. The food is so so yum that we went back for the second time. On our second visit we were served by Avo. She was also extremely pleasant and served us with a smile and made our experience very memorable. The food was just as tasty if not better.

I HIGHLY recommend this place to everyone who wants authentic Vietnamese food.

Keep in mind when you place an order the food will come in 2-3 minutes which is crazy fast. So order your starters first and once you’re done with that then order the main course.

Excellent food
Excellent service
Excellent ambience

The food was absolutely fantastic — fresh, flavorful, and perfectly prepared. The service was top-notch, and Nami was simply outstanding – friendly, professional, and truly exceptional. Highly recommended!

Great food.
Great atmosphere.
Very good service by Tony.
We went there for a small lunch.
Choose for fries spring rolls, Pho Bo and chicken Curry. Everything was freshly prepared within minutes. And it was delicious.
The restaurant was conveniently located near Ben Thanh market. The standout dish was a vegan dish with tofu and eggplant. Great service by our waiter long.
Delicious food! Kevin and staff were very attentive. Busy but we waited less than 5 minutes for a table A wide choice of food and drink including vegetarian and vegan options. A nice lively vibe 👍
Awesome food and great service. Easy to make a reservation via WhatsApp! We went as a party of 4 and food came out pretty fast with Lime showing us how to eat the food and method. Thanks!

Absolutely loved this restaurant! I came here for the Pho and it did not disappoint! Ryan was so lovely and welcoming and made sure I was happy with everything! Highly recommend this place when you're in Ho Chi Minh!
The food was amazing and the service was even better. Nami was incredible and taught us how to wrap a Vietnamese pancake with rice paper. 10/10

Delicious beef pho with fragrant leaves.

Juice super fresh- had mango and strawberry juice

Amazing service from Ryan who is also an amazing photographer !!
The food was great, and most importantly, the service was excellent. Special thanks to Long for his outstanding hospitality. Highly recommended! 🤩

UNACCEPTABLY FAKE-NICE SERVICE - NEVER RECOMMEND THIS ! NOT AUTHENTIC VIETNAMESE RESTAURANT! I came here because of good and high reviews. Sadly i found out those are actually pressured reviews from the servers here. Fairly but pricey food. Banh Xeo was cold and not cripsy, it seems like a PRE-COOKED food. Also,  I noticed the manager/team leader wiped the table with a dirty cloth that dropped on the floor...(talk about no hygiene here!). The manager/team leader TOLD their team members "only accept customers with available tables and KICK THEM OUT when no available seats" ( What is this ?)

Great place to eat! The staff are very friendly, especially Jack — he was so helpful and even showed us how to prepare the food the right way. The atmosphere is nice and welcoming. Definitely worth a visit!
Pretty decent and fragrant food, and our waiter Tomy was super friendly and very attentive! He also gave us great recommendations

Ordered 2 beef phos, and 2 spring rolls (vegetable and pork). The spring rolls were the star of the show! Love the service and the friendly staff — shoutout to Ryan! I will surely come back when I visit Ho Chi Minh again.

DAVID WAS THE BEST! We had a large group and he was actually the best! He took such good care of us and all our needs! Truly the best ever and I would truly go back just to have him as a waiter! Food was also amazing and overall such a good experience! 10/10 overall!

Very much worth the experience! Very attentive and friendly staff!
The food was good.
We really enjoyed our meal here. The food was so satisfying and tasted genuinely authentic — the kind that reminds you of home and makes you slow down and enjoy every bite. Nothing felt overdone; just honest, well-cooked dishes done right. We left feeling full, happy, and already talking about what we’d order next time. Definitely a spot we’d come back to and happily recommend to friends.

Nhà hàng Quá Ngon nổi tiếng tại Sài Gòn 16 năm nay, chuyên tổ chức các tiệc lớn nhỏ: Tiệc thôi nôi, Sinh nhật, Họp mặt, Liên hoan, Hiếu hỷ,…
Dân sành ẩm thực đang “kháo” nhau là muốn ăn hải sản, đặc sản ngon thì hãy đến Nhà hàng Quá Ngon. Để tìm được một địa chỉ ăn ngon, giá phải chăng, cảnh quan đẹp, an toàn sức khỏe thì cũng khó như “tìm kim đáy bể” trong vô vàn quán ăn, nhà hàng hiện nay. Thường cảnh đẹp thì thức ăn dở, mắc hoặc ngược lại, tuy nhiên để đủ các ưu điểm “4 trong 1” như trên trong một nhà hàng thì rất hiếm. Nhưng thật là vui khi tại Sài Gòn có Nhà hàng Quá Ngon lại có đủ được những điều này.

Nhà hàng Những Người Bạn nằm trên đường Phan Văn Trị, quận Gò Vấp, TP. Hồ Chí Minh, là điểm đến lý tưởng cho những buổi tụ họp gia đình hay bạn bè. Với không gian sân vườn rộng hơn 4000m² thoáng đãng, thiết kế theo phong cách Nam Bộ gần gũi thiên nhiên, kèm hầm rượu vang độc đáo và nhiều phòng VIP sang trọng, nơi đây mang lại cảm giác thư thái, ấm cúng.
Thực đơn đa dạng món Việt từ ba miền, đặc biệt hải sản tươi sống, các món đặc sản như sườn nướng nhà làm, vịt cỏ tùng xẻo, lẩu hải sản hay nem cua bể – tất cả đều được chế biến đậm đà, nguyên liệu chất lượng. Nhân viên phục vụ nhiệt tình, chu đáo, luôn sẵn sàng hỗ trợ.
Giá cả hợp lý khoảng 200.000 - 300.000đ/người, phù hợp cho tiệc liên hoan, sum họp. Đây là lựa chọn tuyệt vời để tận hưởng bữa ăn ngon trong không gian xanh mát giữa Sài Gòn nhộn nhịp.

Local restaurant which is very spacious yet very well managed. The food is tasty and served quite fast, even at the peak time on Sunday evening.
Parking is free for both cars and motorbikes.
There are indoor and outdoor sections. Outdoor is open space, suitable for dinner but it is hot at this time and noisy too.
Indoor may be nice for parties or family gatherings and the air con is turned on too strong inside it gets too cold.
We are quite pleased with this restaurant and may come back in the near future.

Tôi vừa có cơ hội thưởng thức một tô phở tại quán, và thật sự ấn tượng với hương vị đậm đà, chuẩn vị Việt Nam mà quán mang lại.

**1. Vị phở đậm đà, thơm ngon:**
Nước dùng tại quán thực sự là điểm nhấn. Hương vị ngọt từ xương, kết hợp với mùi thơm của quế, hồi, và thảo quả tạo nên một bát phở đậm đà và hấp dẫn. Thịt bò tái chín mềm, không dai, hòa quyện cùng bánh phở trắng ngần, tạo nên một trải nghiệm ẩm thực tuyệt vời.

**2. Nguyên liệu tươi ngon:**
Các nguyên liệu tại quán luôn tươi ngon, từ rau sống như rau thơm, húng quế, giá đỗ đến chanh và ớt tươi. Thịt bò cũng được chọn lọc kỹ càng, đảm bảo độ tươi và an toàn thực phẩm.

**3. Không gian quán sạch sẽ, thoáng mát:**
Quán có không gian rộng rãi, thoáng mát và luôn giữ gìn vệ sinh sạch sẽ. Nhân viên phục vụ nhiệt tình, chu đáo, tạo cảm giác thoải mái cho khách hàng.

**4. Giá cả hợp lý:**
Với chất lượng tuyệt vời, giá cả tại quán rất hợp lý và phù hợp với túi tiền của nhiều người. Bạn chắc chắn sẽ cảm thấy hài lòng với số tiền mình bỏ ra.

Tóm lại, quán phở Việt Nam thực sự là một địa chỉ lý tưởng cho những ai yêu thích phở Việt Nam. Hương vị đậm đà, nguyên liệu tươi ngon cùng với không gian thoáng đãng và phục vụ tận tình đã tạo nên một trải nghiệm ẩm thực khó quên. Tôi chắc chắn sẽ quay lại và giới thiệu quán cho bạn bè và người thân.

Không gian, giá cả, phục vụ phù hợp với giá tiền, tô phở tái 65k, nếu ăn thố thì 100k. Ngồi máy lạnh mát mẻ, nhân viên và gửi xe thân thiện. Ngồi ăn xem đầu bếp làm bánh phở cũng khá vui.

Nhà vệ sinh cũng sạch sẽ.

Quán phở Việt Nam là một địa điểm lý tưởng cho những tín đồ yêu thích món phở truyền thống. Quán có không gian rộng rãi và thoáng mát, tạo cảm giác dễ chịu cho thực khách khi bước vào. Bàn ghế được sắp xếp chỉn chu, mang đến sự sạch sẽ và thoải mái cho mọi người, từ những buổi họp mặt gia đình đến những cuộc gặp gỡ bạn bè.
Một điểm nổi bật của quán là sợi phở được tự làm ngay tại chỗ, cho phép khách hàng quan sát quá trình làm phở. Sợi phở dai, mềm và thơm, mang lại hương vị đặc trưng mà không phải nơi nào cũng có. Thịt phở được xử lý rất tốt, đạt đến độ mềm vừa phải, có độ sật, tạo cảm giác thú vị khi thưởng thức. Nước lèo ở đây cũng rất ngon, ngọt thanh tự nhiên từ xương và các gia vị được ninh kỹ, làm nổi bật hương vị của phở.
Về mức giá, quán phở Việt Nam có giá trung bình từ 60.000 đến 70.000 đồng cho một tô phở đầy đặn. Đây là mức giá hợp lý cho chất lượng món ăn và không gian phục vụ. Đến với quán, bạn không chỉ được thưởng thức một tô phở ngon miệng mà còn cảm nhận được sự tận tâm trong từng chi tiết của quán.
Tổng kết lại, quán phở Việt Nam là một sự lựa chọn tuyệt vời cho những ai yêu thích phở và muốn tìm kiếm một không gian thoải mái để thưởng thức bữa ăn. Hãy ghé qua quán để trải nghiệm ngay hương vị phở tuyệt hảo này!
Rộng rãi nhờ vị trí ngay góc đường , sạch sẽ, thiết kế cửa kính 2 phía nên sáng sủa và không ồn ào, phục vụ tốt .

Tôi đến thăm một công ty gần đó và quán này được giới thiệu là điểm dừng chân ăn trưa trên đường về nhà.

Nhìn vào lượng hơi nước ngưng tụ, có vẻ như quán này hơi thất vọng hơn mức trung bình.

Tôi rất kỳ vọng vào món phở vì có đuôi bò, nhưng nước dùng lại loãng hơn phở thông thường.

Phở, được cho là phở nhà làm, có độ mềm và dai, đó là một điểm cộng.

Nói theo hướng tiêu cực, nó mất đi một phần độ dai và dễ bị nát hơn.

Tôi không biết nhà hàng nào khác trong khu vực, nhưng tôi không thấy lý do gì để chọn quán này.

Nếu quán này được giới thiệu, có lẽ là vì không có nhiều nhà hàng ngon ở quanh đây.

Hãy thử Amuk Ta Sườn. Chúng mềm mại và tuyệt vời vô cùng. Sợi mì gần giống với mì quảng, một loại phở cuốn của Hà Nội được cắt thành sợi mỏng. Sẽ hoàn hảo hơn nếu sợi mì mỏng và mềm hơn một chút, nhưng tôi thích việc họ tự làm mì, điều này khiến tôi tự tin hơn. Bên trong sạch sẽ và thoáng mát, và nhân viên có vẻ được đào tạo bài bản. Tôi không thể chê nhà hàng này ở điểm nào.

À... Mùi giống hệt món thịt bò mình từng ăn ở các quán bún Pháp. Nhà hàng này ngon tuyệt vời. Mình nhất định phải đến đây cùng mọi người. Mình không chụp ảnh vì đang ăn. Ăn kèm với nước ép dưa hấu nguyên chất.
Phở ở đây rất ngon và trên hết là có rất nhiều lựa chọn khác nhau. Những bát phở chúng tôi gọi đều có hương vị rất đậm đà. Chúng tôi chắc chắn sẽ giới thiệu quán này!
Khẩu phần ăn khá nhiều, thịt cũng nhiều, và thức ăn rất ngon. Quán sạch sẽ và có sẵn trà, khá tiện lợi.

Đây là một quán bún nổi tiếng ở khu Gò Vấp.

Quán phục vụ khẩu vị của người nước ngoài và khẩu phần ăn khá lớn.

Quán có máy lạnh và đảm bảo vệ sinh.

Điểm độc đáo là họ tự làm bún bằng tay.

Ngoài ra còn có chỗ đậu xe rộng rãi.

Món ăn ngon, chất lượng hơn mong đợi so với giá tiền. Phần ăn đầy đặn, hương vị ổn định và hợp khẩu vị. Nhân viên phục vụ nhanh và dễ thương, để khách không phải đợi lâu. Mình cũng rất thích việc nước được refill thoải mái, vừa tiện vừa tạo cảm giác chu đáo. Nói chung là một trải nghiệm tích cực, chắc chắn sẽ quay lại thêm lần nữa.

Thức ăn ok, 2 cha con đều thấy ổn. Nhưng ngoài ngon ra thì hơi nhiều điểm trừ
1. Mặt bằng thì rộng nhưng thiết kế không gian cực kì chật. Quán 1 trệt 2 lầu mà mỗi lầu kê được tầm 3-4 bàn sát sát nhau. Mỗi lầu chỉ cần 2 gia đình có trẻ em vào ngồi là ồn như nhà trẻ.
2. Chiều cao giữa 2 bậc thang có vẻ cao hơn bình thường, mà mô hình này phần lớn trẻ em vào ăn nhiều, đi không cẩn thận là té đập mặt ngay.
3. Giá cao so với mặt bằng chung. 1 đùi gà tỏi như hình giá 15k.
Mỳ ý gà chiên xốt carbonara ngon, lạ miệng, có vị béo nhẹ và rất đặc biệt.
Quán ăn đẹp, sạch sẽ, nhân viên dễ thương và niềm nở. Đồ ăn rất ngon và giá hợp lý với hssv. CÔ CHỦ RẤT ĐÁNG YÊU 💗💗💗

Nhân viên phục vụ rất dễ thương, thân thiện. Không gian quán ổn, ngồi ở góc ngã tư nên khá thoáng và dễ quan sát. Điểm cộng nữa là nước được refill, khá dễ chịu khi ngồi lâu.

Mình gọi cơm gà gỏi xoài. Món có vị chua cay đậm đà, gỏi xoài trộn rất vừa nhưng có hành khô sống, bạn nào không ăn được hành thì nên lưu ý. Gà phủ gỏi nhưng vẫn giữ được độ giòn, ăn khá thích.

Chester's Việt Nam - Nơ Trang Long
Tọa lạc tại 170A Nơ Trang Long, Bình Thạnh, đây là điểm đến thú vị cho những tín đồ của gà rán và các món ăn nhanh mang phong cách hiện đại:
* Vị trí: Cửa hàng nằm ở vị trí đẹp và thuận tiện, dễ tìm ngay trên trục đường sầm uất, rất thuận lợi cho việc ghé ăn tại chỗ hoặc mua mang về.
* Chất lượng món ăn: Đồ ăn được đánh giá là khá ngon và rất vừa miệng. Thực đơn tại đây có ưu điểm là nhiều hương vị đa dạng, giúp thực khách có nhiều lựa chọn đổi mới thay vì các vị truyền thống nhàm chán.
* Món tiêu biểu: Món mì sốt cua hoàng kim là một điểm nhấn đáng chú ý. Phần sốt có độ béo ngậy, thơm đặc trưng và lạ miệng, kết hợp khá hài hòa với mì, tạo nên trải nghiệm ẩm thực bắt vị.
* Tổng kết: Một địa chỉ ăn uống ổn áp tại Bình Thạnh với không gian chỉn chu và hương vị món ăn đậm đà. Đây là lựa chọn lý tưởng cho một bữa ăn nhanh nhưng vẫn đảm bảo sự ngon miệng và đa dạng về khẩu vị.

Thấy mở được vài tháng nên ghé thử trong dịp Tết này. Đồ ăn khá khô khan, gà tươi ok, giá cả ổn.

Có một điểm là nhận được thẻ cào với hoá đơn 100k (của mình 317k), tưởng được 3 thẻ. Cái đó không nói. Đáng chú ý là mình có con nhỏ, nhân viên bắt cào tại quầy. Mình nói đem lên lầu để cho mấy đứa nó cào, dù gì cũng ăn tại quán chứ có mang đi. Nói mãi mới hiểu được vấn đề.

Nhận được phần thưởng "ly nước ngọt refill". Phần ăn mình đã có 4 lý rồi, thêm 1 nữa là 5, nhân viên nói để dành cho lần sau. Mình tính là vậy cho đến khi ăn xong, xin cái nắp ly để mang nước về do refill uống không hết. Không có nắp, ok, vẫn không sao. Rồi mình xin cái bịch, không cho bịch để cầm ly mang về luôn. Wow. Mình mới hỏi nếu khách mua mang về thì cầm kiểu gì, nhân viên (nam) không giải thích gì thêm mà chỉ nói là không có bịch.

Đến cái bịch còn không có thì chịu. Cách tới già nhé. Xin cám ơn.

PS: không rảnh chụp bill. Chỉ nhớ chính xác một phần A1 và A4 cộng thêm chai nước suối = 317k. Bye bye.

Quán cơm Việt này thật sự mang lại cảm giác gần gũi và thân thuộc, đúng kiểu hương vị bữa cơm gia đình mà nhiều người tìm kiếm giữa cuộc sống bận rộn. Ngay từ lúc bước vào, bạn sẽ thấy không gian ấm cúng, bố trí sạch sẽ và dễ chịu. Nhân viên ở đây cực kỳ thân thiện, nụ cười luôn thường trực, cách phục vụ nhẹ nhàng mà chu đáo khiến người ăn cảm thấy như đang được đón tiếp trong chính căn bếp của mình vậy.

Về món ăn, không thể chê vào đâu được – đúng 5 sao trọn vẹn! Cơm Việt ở đây được nấu vừa dẻo, thơm mùi gạo mới, từng hạt cơm trắng mịn kết hợp cùng các món mặn và canh theo kiểu truyền thống. Mỗi phần ăn đều được bày biện gọn gàng, nhìn thôi đã thấy muốn ăn ngay. Món thịt kho trứng béo ngậy, nước kho sệt lại đậm đà, thấm vào cơm ngon đến miếng cuối cùng. Rau luộc giòn tươi, ăn kèm chén nước chấm mắm tỏi ớt cay mặn ngọt hài hòa – đúng kiểu “đưa cơm” chuẩn vị nhà.

Điểm đặc biệt ở quán là đầu bếp rất biết cân bằng giữa khẩu vị ba miền, nên dù bạn là người Bắc, Trung hay Nam đều dễ dàng tìm thấy món hợp gu. Ngoài cơm Việt, quán đôi khi còn kèm thêm một vài món ăn chơi như chả giò, cá kho, hoặc món canh chua cá lóc thay đổi theo ngày để thực khách không bị ngán. Giá cả thì quá hợp lý so với chất lượng, đúng chuẩn “ngon – bổ – rẻ”.

Bầu không khí của quán cũng là một điểm cộng cực lớn. Không gian rộng rãi, thoáng mát, ánh sáng tự nhiên chan hòa khiến buổi trưa dù đông khách vẫn không cảm thấy ngột ngạt. Hương thơm từ gian bếp lan tỏa dễ chịu chứ không hề nồng. Thỉnh thoảng còn nghe tiếng nhạc nhẹ du dương giúp bữa ăn thêm thoải mái.

Nhìn chung, đây là một trong những quán cơm Việt hiếm hoi vừa có hương vị ngon chuẩn nhà, vừa có phong cách phục vụ tận tình và giá cả hợp lý. Nếu bạn đang tìm một nơi để thưởng thức hương vị cơm Việt đúng nghĩa giữa lòng thành phố, thì đây chắc chắn là địa điểm nên lưu lại trong danh sách. Một bữa ăn vừa tròn vị, vừa ấm lòng — không chỉ vì món ngon, mà còn vì sự thân thiện của những con người làm nên quán này.

Update 10/2025:
Lần đầu mình đánh giá quán 3 sao. Hôm nay sửa thành 1 sao. Có nhiều người góp ý về vấn đề vệ sinh rồi, mà quán vẫn "trả treo" với khách được thì thiết nghĩ bạn không thích hợp với ngành dịch vụ.
Hôm nay vì không biết ăn cái gì, quán gần nhà mình, nên mình ghé để thay đổi khẩu vị. Quán đã đổi sang địa chỉ mới, phía bên kia đường bên cạnh Apollo Nguyễn Thái Sơn. Quán mới đẹp hơn, có điều hoà mát. Không biết là quán sang nhượng hay vẫn chủ cũ. Vào quán chỉ có một nam thanh niên bán hàng, thay vì bạn nữ trẻ ở quán cũ. Bạn nữ này thích xưng "chị", gọi người khác bằng "em". Lần này mình nhận được một tô bún có rắc một nắm hành phía trên, hành sống hoàn toàn, cắt còn chưa đứt mà thành vài khúc dài nối vào nhau (bực quá nên mình hớt bỏ đi, tính không chụp ảnh, không comment thêm gì nữa vì quán này không có khả năng tiếp nhận góp ý). Một hồi bạn bán hàng bưng ra rổ rau sống, giá đỗ vừa thâm vừa cũ như hình (chắc để từ hôm qua). Đến lúc này thì mình không thốt nên lời nữa. Mình không ăn một cọng rau sống nào. Nhưng khi ra về thì bắt đầu thấy nhâm nhẩm đau bụng. Giống như một bạn đã từng review và bị quán trách ngược là do bụng bạn ấy không hợp với món bún của quán (???!!!). Không còn gì để nói thêm nữa... Vừa hại sức khoẻ, vừa bực mình.

Ưu điểm là giá rẻ, dành cho sinh viên vì địa điểm gần trường Công nghiệp. Quán dành cho tệp khách hàng dễ tính, miễn ăn no là được. Topping đầy đặn (so với giá thành).
Nhược điểm: Vệ sinh kém. Cụ thể là việc rửa chén. Chén dĩa rửa ướt nguyên, lật cái chén lên là thấy chén phía dưới đầy ngập nước, và mấy cái bên dưới nữa cũng thế.
Quán khá nhỏ, chỉ có vài bộ bàn ghế.
Không biết nhân viên hay chủ quán bán hàng nhưng mình không thấy lịch sự cho lắm. Món ăn không thực sự hấp dẫn để quay lại.

Đọc đánh giá thấy cũng hơi rén, nhưng mà đang thèm món miền trung nên mình cũng ghé thử. Mình gọi bánh canh và bún đặc biệt, nước lèo đậm đà, các gia vị nêm nếm ăn cùng cũng đầy đủ và chuẩn vị. Mình thấy rau sạch, cá tươi. Còn về thái độ phục vụ thì mình thấy theo kiểu tồ tồ của người miền trung á. Mình là người miền trung nên thấy cũng bình thường, chị bé tiếp chuyện mình cũng vui vẻ. Tuy nhiên, nếu quán kinh doanh ở thị trường HCM thì nên cải thiện phần nhiệt tình hơn trong việc tiếp khách, đon đả và cởi mở hơn chẳng hạn. Sẽ quay lại khi thèm.
Bánh canh ngon, chuẩn vị Đà Nẵng. Chỗ ngồi cũng thoáng mát.
Bánh canh chả cá ngon á, vị thanh thanh nước chấm mặn mà
Ăn rất nhiều lần ròi, có đôi lúc nước dùng ko có đồng đều, hôm nhạt hôm ngon. Nhưng mà luôn ở mức ổn, nv dễ thương vui tính.

Quán không quá rộng nhưng khá thoáng, tương đối sạch sẽ, nhưng nên có nhiều sọt rác hơn. Nước thanh, ngọt, cá cháy thấm vị, thơm, có nghệ và rau răm. Có bánh canh và bún, nhiều món thêm. Chả cá có 2 loại, thơm và dai. 3 tô bánh canh cá cháy, cộng 1 tô chả cá, 1 tô măng thêm chỉ có 115k. Quá ngon cho 1 bữa tối.
Khá giống với vị Đà Nẵng rồi. Ăn ngon nha mọi người, ghé ủng hộ Đồng Hương Đà Nẵng ạ.
Đợt trước mình ăn khẩu phần ăn nhiều hơn, đợt này quay lại thấy ít bánh hơn đợt trước. Dịch vụ nhiệt tình, dễ thương. Bầu ko khí vui vẻ. Nói chung là 8/10 ạ
Thái độ phục vụ tệ và ra món lâu. Lúc vào quán chỉ có mình tôi nhưng cũng mất 15p mới có món. Chả cá hôi. Cá cháy thì chẳng có gì đặc biệt.

Quán rộng rãi, thoáng mát và sạch sẽ, phong cách đúng kiểu quán chuyên bò tơ nên ngồi nhóm đông cũng rất thoải mái. Bàn ghế chắc chắn, phục vụ nhanh, dù khách đông nhưng món lên đều và không để khách chờ lâu. Nhân viên thân thiện và nhiệt tình.

Thịt bò tơ ở đây phải nói là chất lượng. Mình thử bò nướng, bò hấp sả và gân bò, món nào cũng tươi, mềm và giữ được độ ngọt tự nhiên. Bò nướng được ướp vừa vị, nướng lên thơm lừng. Món bò hấp sả thì ngọt thanh, chấm muối ớt xanh rất hợp. Rau rừng và rau sống ăn kèm nhiều và tươi, làm món ăn cân bằng hơn. Nước chấm là điểm cộng lớn, đậm đà và làm hương vị bò nổi bật. Lẩu bò ở đây cũng ngon, nước lẩu ngọt xương, ăn kèm rau và mì rất đã.

Giá cả hợp lý so với chất lượng và khẩu phần đầy đặn. Đây thật sự là địa chỉ tuyệt vời cho những ai thích bò tơ tươi ngon tại Gò Vấp.

- Bò Nướng Tảng - Thăn Ngoại cho có da: thịt mềm và da nướng lên sần sật chấm sốt ngon.
- Bò Tơ Cuộn Rau Rừng - bò tơ hấp tía tô cuốn bánh tráng và rau rừng chấm mắm tôm: ngon, da giòn, rau tươi, hành tây ngọt giòn.
- Lẩu Bò Nhân Phát: súp kiểu thuốc bắc thơm ngon + nhiều loại thịt ăn kèm vào lẩu: thịt thăn ngoại, gân, da, bò viên, thịt thăn/bắp thái lát. Sa tế đi kèm bỏ thêm vào chén chấm cũng bén lắm.

Hình thức gọi món qua app trên web nên khá khó coi và so sánh để order món. Có combo nhưng không thể kêu vì nhân viên bảo phải đặt trước khi đến mới được gọi combo, trên web lại không thấy yêu cầu đó. Từ khăn giấy tới nước chấm nhân viên đều không mang ra cho mình. Lúc hỏi mới nói anh chị cần khăn khô hay khăn ướt, trong khi các bàn khác cũng set up rất đầy đủ, xui cho nhà mình ngồi ngay bàn chưa kịp set nên nhân viên quên chăng. Dĩa tổng hợp thịt nướng cũng không rẻ nhưng trừ 2 bạn nam phục vụ thì bạn nữ còn lại có vẻ hơi đánh giá bàn mình, không nở được nụ cười. Cơm dưa bò ok. Quán có chỗ ngồi dưới sân nhưng mời khách lên lầu hết chứ không được chọn dù ở dưới không hề có ai hay bảng đã đặt chỗ. Mình có hỏi cũng không được giải đáp. Lúc ra lấy xe thì các bạn bếp hít thuốc lá khói phì phèo. Đó là việc cá nhân nhưng nếu các bạn né đừng ngồi trước mặt tiền ngay chỗ khách ra vào thì sẽ hay hơn ạ.
Món ăn ngon , phục vụ nhiệt tình , CTKM hấp dẫn. Tuyệt!

Mộc Riêu Nướng - Võ Văn Kiệt,
- Quán nướng & các món nhậu nằm ngay mặt tiền đường Võ Văn Kiệt. Dễ nhận diện, thiết kết đơn giản & sắc màu.
- Tầng thượng với không gian mở tương đối thoáng đãng. Hôm mình đi thì trời âm u (hơi hầm), sau đó thì mưa rỉ rả nên phải kéo bạt che. Không gian kín cảm giác hơi ngộp & nóng bức. Có hỏi mấy bạn nhân viên có quạt không thì các bạn bảo có quạt. Nhưng mang ra thì dây không tới => như không. Ở đây có đầy đủ các món ăn Việt. Giá có hơi cao hơn trung bình xíu thôi nhưng với vị trí trung tâm quận 1 và chất lượng món ăn thì thật sự đáng đồng tiền.
